unitTests

Class ArrayListTest

  • java.lang.Object
    • unitTests.ArrayListTest

  • public class ArrayListTest
extends java.lang.Object
    Version:
    3.2 Aug. 28, 2024 Class Description: Test for the array-based implementation of the ListADT defined in the CPRG304 Assignment 2.
    Author:
    kitty, maryam

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ArrayListTest() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setUp()
      Initializes a new MyArrayList instance and five Integer instances before each test.
      void tearDown()
      Cleans up instances used after each test.
      void testAddAll_ArrayList()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#addAll(utilities.List) to add an ArrayList to the list.
      void testAddAll_DLL()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#addAll(utilities.List) to add a DLL to the list.
      void testAddAll_NullPointerException()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#addAll(utilities.List) to add a null to the list to throw a NullPointerException.
      void testAddE_ItemAddedCorrectly_MultipleElements()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add multiple items.
      void testAddE_ItemAddedCorrectly_OneElement()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add one item to empty list.
      void testAddE_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(int, java.lang.Object) to add a null to a list and throw NullPointerException.
      void testAddE_ResizeArray()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add 100 items to the list (beyond default capacity of 10).
      void testAddE_returnTrue()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add item to an empty list and return true.
      void testAddIntE_IndexOutOfBoundsException_Negative()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(int, java.lang.Object) to add an item to a positive invalid index and throw IndexOutOfBoundsException.
      void testAddIntE_IndexOutOfBoundsException_Positive()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(int, java.lang.Object) to add an item to a positive invalid index and throw IndexOutOfBoundsExceptionx.
      void testAddIntE_ItemAddedCorrectly_Empty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add an item to an empty list an position 0.
      void testAddIntE_ItemAddedCorrectly_Head()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add an item to the head of the list.
      void testAddIntE_ItemAddedCorrectly_Tail()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(java.lang.Object) to add an item to the tail of the list.
      void testAddIntE_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(int, java.lang.Object) to add null to a list and throw NullPointerException.
      void testAddIntE_returnTrue()
      Test method for MyArrayList.add(int, java.lang.Object) to add item to an empty list and return true.
      void testClear_Size()
      Test method for MyArrayList.clear() to clear a non-empty list.
      void testConstructor()
      Test method for constructor of MyArrayList class.
      void testContains_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyArrayList.contains(java.lang.Object) to pass a null item and throw NullPointerException.
      void testContains_returnFalse()
      Test method for MyArrayList.contains(java.lang.Object) to check for the existence of an item and return false.
      void testContains_returnTrue()
      Test method for MyArrayList.contains(java.lang.Object) to check for the existence of an item and return true.
      void testGetInt_Head()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to get the first item in the list.
      void testGetInt_IndexOutOfBoundsException_Empty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to get an item in position 0 of an empty list and throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException.
      void testGetInt_IndexOutOfBoundsException_NegativeIndex()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException when getting from an invalid negative index.
      void testGetInt_IndexOutOfBoundsException_PositiveIndex()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException when getting from an invalid positive index.
      void testGetInt_Middle()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to get the middle item in the list.
      void testGetInt_One()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to return the only item in list.
      void testGetInt_Tail()
      Test method for MyArrayList.get(int) to get the last item in the list.
      void testIsEmpty_False()
      Test method for MyArrayList.isEmpty() to return false when list is not empty.
      void testIsEmpty_True()
      Test method for MyArrayList.isEmpty() to return true when list is empty.
      void testIterator_Empty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.iterator() to get an iterator for an empty list.
      void testIterator()
      Test method for MyArrayList.iterator() to get an iterator items in a list with multiple items.
      void testRemove_Found()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to remove a found item from a list with multiple items.
      void testRemove_NotFound()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to remove a not found item.
      void testRemoveE_NullPointerException()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#remove(E) to throw a NullPointerException when removing a null object from the list.
      void testRemoveE_OneElement()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#remove(E) to remove from a list with only one item.
      void testRemoveInt_Head()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to remove the item at the head of the list.
      void testRemoveInt_IndexOutOfBoundsException_Empty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException on an empty list.
      void testRemoveInt_IndexOutOfBoundsException_NegativeIndex()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException on a list with multiple items.
      void testRemoveInt_IndexOutOfBoundsException_PositiveIndex()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException on a list with multiple items.
      void testRemoveInt_NotHeadOrTail()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to remove the item at neither head nor tail of the list.
      void testRemoveInt_OneElement()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to remove the only item in the list.
      void testRemoveInt_Tail()
      Test method for MyArrayList.remove(int) to remove the item at the tail of the list.
      void testSet_Head()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to set the item at the head of the list to a new item.
      void testSet_IndexOutOfBoundsException_Empty()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException on an empty list.
      void testSet_IndexOutOfBoundsException_NegativeIndex()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to throw IndexOutOfBoundsException on a negative invalid index.
      void testSet_IndexOutOfBoundsException_PositiveIndex()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to throw IndexOutOfBoundsException on a positive invalid index.
      void testSet_NullPointerException()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to throw a NullPointerException when a null is passed for the item to set.
      void testSet_SpecificIndex()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to set the item at neither head nor tail position in the list to a new item.
      void testSet_Tail()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#set(int, E) to set the item at tail of the list to a new item.
      void testSize_AddMany()
      Test method for MyArrayList.size() to return size of a list after adding multiple items.
      void testSize_AddOneToEmpty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.size() to return size of a list after adding one item.
      void testSize_Empty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.size() to return size of an empty list.
      void testSize_RemoveMany()
      Test method for MyArrayList.size() to return the size of a list after removing a few items.
      void testSize_RemoveOneToEmpty()
      Test method for MyArrayList.size() to return the size of a list after removing the only item.
      void testToArray()
      Test method for MyArrayList.toArray() to return an Object array containing all items in the list.
      void testToArrayEArray_Insufficient()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#toArray(T[]) to return an array containing all items of the list when the list has insufficient length.
      void testToArrayEArray_Sufficient()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#toArray(T[]) to return an array containing all items of the list when the list has sufficient length.
      void testToArrayNullArray()
      Test method for implementations.MyArrayList#toArray(T[]) to throw a NullPointerException when a null is passed.
